from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Dict, List


@dataclass
class PipelineStage:
    name: str
    params: Dict[str, str] = {"mode": "default"}
    steps: List[str] = ["validate", "transform"]


@dataclass
class TrainingRun:
    run_id: str
    metrics: Dict[str, float] = {}
    artifacts: List[str] = []
